event.name: EFL Championship Play-Off Final 2026 — Leeds United vs Coventry City

context.pre_match_notes: Wembley. £200M promotion prize. Leeds fanbase 5× size of Coventry — supporter pressure massive. Leeds finished 3rd in Championship regular season, Coventry 6th. Leeds had the higher SMS throughout the season. Both full strength for final.

question: Predict the match direction and key signal variables for a neutral venue final.

verified_outcome.key_variable: commercial_tier_gap + fanbase_depth_signal — Leeds supporter advantage at Wembley
